=== WAVE 2+3 Functional Tests ===

--- lib/env.sh ---
[0;34m[oml][0m Generating .env template → /tmp/oml-test-home/env/.env.template
<stdin>:14: DeprecationWarning: datetime.datetime.utcnow() is deprecated and scheduled for removal in a future version. Use timezone-aware objects to represent datetimes in UTC: datetime.datetime.now(datetime.UTC).
Generated /tmp/oml-test-home/env/.env.template with 7 variables (3 required, 4 optional)
[0;32m[oml] ✓[0m Generated .env template at /tmp/oml-test-home/env/.env.template
Template contents:
# oh-my-longfor Environment Variables
# Generated by oml on 2026-02-26 00:28 UTC
#
# USAGE:
#   1. Copy this file: cp ~/.oml/env/.env.template ~/.env.oml
#   2. Fill in your values in ~/.env.oml
#   3. Add to your shell rc: [ -f ~/.env.oml ] && source ~/.env.oml
#
# Run 'oml env' to check which variables are set.

# ─── Required ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# Context7 API key for documentation MCP. Get from https://context7.com/settings (free tier available)
CONTEXT7_API_KEY=

# Sentry authentication token for error tracking MCP. Create at https://sentry.io/settings/account/api/auth-tokens/
SENTRY_TOKEN=

# GitHub personal access token for GitHub MCP and private skill repos. Create at https://github.com/settings/tokens with repo scope
GITHUB_TOKEN=

# ─── Optional ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# Linear API key for project management MCP. Get from https://linear.app/settings/api
LINEAR_API_KEY=

# Slack Bot OAuth token for Slack MCP. Create a Slack App at https://api.slack.com/apps
SLACK_BOT_TOKEN=

# OpenAI API key for GPT-4 model access in oracle agent. Get from https://platform.openai.com/api-keys
OPENAI_API_KEY=

# Anthropic API key for Claude model access. Get from https://console.anthropic.com/settings/keys
ANTHROPIC_API_KEY=
PASS: .env template generated

PASS: backup functions work

--- lib/config.sh ---
[0;34m[oml][0m Backup created: /tmp/oml-test-home/backups/2026-02-26-002849
[0;34m[oml][0m Generating opencode.json from manifest...
Generated /tmp/oml-test-home/config/opencode.json
  MCPs: 6
  skills.paths entries: 1 (symlinks used for actual discovery)
[0;32m[oml] ✓[0m Generated opencode.json
Generated opencode.json content:
{
  "$schema": "https://opencode.ai/config.json",
  "mcp": {
    "context7": {
      "type": "remote",
      "url": "https://mcp.context7.com/sse",
      "headers": {
        "Authorization": "Bearer {env:CONTEXT7_API_KEY}"
      }
    },
    "sentry": {
      "type": "remote",
      "url": "https://mcp.sentry.io/sse",
      "headers": {
        "Authorization": "Bearer {env:SENTRY_TOKEN}"
      }
    },
    "github": {
      "type": "remote",
      "url": "https://api.githubcopilot.com/mcp/sse",
      "headers": {
        "Authorization": "Bearer {env:GITHUB_TOKEN}",
        "X-GitHub-Api-Version": "2022-11-28"
      }
    },
    "linear": {
      "type": "remote",
      "url": "https://mcp.linear.app/sse",
      "headers": {
        "Authorization": "Bearer {env:LINEAR_API_KEY}"
      }
    },
    "slack": {
      "type": "remote",
      "url": "https://mcp.slack.com/sse",
      "headers": {
        "Authorization": "Bearer {env:SLACK_BOT_TOKEN}"
      }
    },
    "test-mcp": {
      "type": "remote",
      "url": "https://test.example.com"
    }
  },
  "skills": {
    "paths": [
      "/tmp/oml-test-home/repos/team-config"
    ]
  }
}
JSON valid, MCPs: 6
[0;34m[oml][0m Generating oh-my-opencode.jsonc from manifest...
Generated /tmp/oml-test-home/config/oh-my-opencode.jsonc
[0;32m[oml] ✓[0m Generated oh-my-opencode.jsonc
PASS: config generation works
--- bin/oml tests ---

  oml — oh-my-longfor team AI dev environment manager

  USAGE:
    oml <command> [options]

  COMMANDS:
    install <url>          Install from a team-config git URL or local path
    update                 Pull latest team config and regenerate all configs
    status                 Show current state of repos, configs, and env vars
    doctor                 Run diagnostic checks with fix suggestions
    env                    Show which required env vars are set / missing
    override <subcommand>  Manage personal MCP/skill additions
    rollback [timestamp]   Restore configs from a previous backup
    backup list            List available config backups
    version                Print oml version
    help                   Show this help message

  OVERRIDE SUBCOMMANDS:
    oml override list
    oml override add-mcp <name> '<json>'
    oml override add-skill-repo <git-url> [branch]
    oml override remove <mcp|skill> <name>

  EXAMPLES:
    oml install https://github.com/your-org/team-config
    oml update
    oml status
    oml doctor
    oml override add-mcp my-mcp '{"type":"remote","url":"https://my.example.com"}'
    oml rollback
    oml rollback 2026-02-25-143022


--- oml version ---
oml version 0.1.0

--- oml status ---

  oml Status
  ──────────────────────────────────────────

  \033[1;33m~\033[0m  Team config:   local copy (not a git repo)  []

  Skill repos:

  Config files:
